title: jasminum fragrans
intro: Jasminum fragrans, also known as the night-blooming jasmine, is a fragrant flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of the Jasminum fragrans plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
